origins.appearance: a fugitive bright with badly behaved magic
origins.backstory: You were already a problem before the room learned your name.

origins.appearance: thin wrists, black thread, and a jawbone charm worn smooth
origins.magicalSignature: bone dust humming in three-part harmony
origins.backstory: Your teacher said every skeleton keeps one useful note.

origins.appearance: a clean imperial collar ripped open at the throat
origins.backstory: You know which imperial clauses scream when cut.

origins.tradition: salt roads, mirage debts, and sunwise names
origins.appearance: sun-browned, quick-smiling, with dust in every oath
origins.magicalSignature: heat shimmer carrying a second, truer outline
origins.backstory: The desert taught you that thirst is a kind of listening.

origins.tradition: river-names, exile pearls, and drowned courtesies
origins.appearance: silver scales at the collarbone and wet eyes that refuse apology
origins.magicalSignature: water remembering the shape of a forbidden name
origins.backstory: You left the tide-courts with one pearl and no permission.
